svg.title: Deterministic Alternative Root Namespace — System Architecture
svg.desc: Four-layer architecture: DGA seed layer, Alt-Root DNS layer, Hex-to-IP translation layer, and P2P gossip distribution layer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the high-entropy seed construction for the DGA')
sendPrompt('How does the hex arithmetic domain formula work?')
sendPrompt('What TLDs does the alt-root namespace use?')
sendPrompt('Show me the BIND9 root zone file configuration for the alt-root')
sendPrompt('How is the custom named.cache root hints file structured?')
sendPrompt('What DNSSEC signing scheme is used for the alt-root?')
sendPrompt('Show the hex-string to IPv4 parsing algorithm')
sendPrompt('How is an Onion v3 address derived from hex output?')
sendPrompt('Explain the gossip protocol for root hints distribution')
sendPrompt('How are root hint bundles signed and verified by peers?')
